name: Banana Wrap
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tortilla on a paper towel.
2. Microwave for 10 to 20 seconds on HIGH until the tortilla is soft and warm.
3. Spread with peanut butter.
4. Top with grape jelly.
5. Place the banana near the right edge of the tortilla.
6. Fold up the bottom fourth of the tortilla.
7. Bring the right edge over the banana.
8. Roll up the wrap.
Recipe from "Boys and Girls Cookbook" Posted by: Sonya Whitaker
